light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了一种高效的Hamiltonian Graph Networks训练方法，挑战了基于梯度下降优化算法的主导地位，促进了物理系统建模的快速和精确实现。其学术价值在于结合物理定律与图神经网络，实际应用潜力包括大规模动态系统模拟。局限性摘要未明确说明，未来工作可能涉及扩展到更复杂领域。

title: FictionalQA: A Dataset for Studying Memorization and Knowledge Acquisition
abstract: When language models are trained on textual data, they acquire both knowledge about the structure of language as well as knowledge of facts about the world. At inference time, their knowledge of facts can be leveraged to solve interesting problems and perform useful knowledge work for users. It is well known that language models can verbatim memorize long sequences from their training data. However, it is much less well understood how language models memorize facts seen during training. In this work, we propose a new dataset to specifically empower researchers to study the dual processes of fact memorization and verbatim sequence memorization. The dataset consists of synthetically-generated, webtext-like documents about fictional events, as well as question-answer pairs about the events. We conduct training experiments showing how synthetic data about fictional events can be useful for studying different forms of memorization. We also document some challenges in effectively building realistic, fictional synthetic data.
comment: 10 pages and 8 figures in the main body. Published at ICLR 2026. Dataset is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/jwkirchenbauer/fictionalqa, and code at https://github.com/jwkirchenbauer/fictionalqa

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出了FictionalQA数据集，专门用于研究语言模型在训练中对事实记忆和逐字序列记忆的双重过程。
light_analysis.motivation: 语言模型训练时不仅学习语言结构，还获取世界事实知识，这些知识在推理时有助于解决实际问题。然而，当前研究对语言模型如何记忆事实的机制理解不足，已知的逐字序列记忆较多，但事实记忆相对不明确。因此，需要专门工具来深入探究这两种记忆形式，以优化模型知识获取和应用，弥补现有方法的局限性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出FictionalQA数据集，包括合成生成的类似网络文本的文档，内容围绕虚构事件，并配备相应的问题-答案对。关键创新在于使用虚构事件来隔离事实记忆，避免真实数据偏见，从而可控地研究记忆机制。研究通过训练实验，利用该数据集分析不同形式的记忆，如事实记忆和序列记忆。数据集构建中还考虑了确保现实性的挑战。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，合成虚构事件数据能有效研究语言模型的记忆过程，展示了其在探究不同记忆形式（如事实记忆和逐字序列记忆）中的实用性。具体性能指标、准确率提升或与基线方法的对比在摘要中未明确说明，但实验验证了方法的可行性和数据集的价值，同时记录了构建合成数据时遇到的技术挑战。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是开发了FictionalQA数据集，为语言模型记忆过程研究提供了新工具，学术价值在于增进对模型知识获取机制的理解，特别是在事实记忆方面。实际应用上，该数据集可作为未来研究的基准，促进AI领域的进展。研究也指出构建真实虚构数据的挑战，这为未来工作指明了改进方向，如优化合成数据生成方法。

title: Beyond RLHF and NLHF: Population-Proportional Alignment under an Axiomatic Framework
abstract: Conventional preference learning methods often prioritize opinions held more widely when aggregating preferences from multiple evaluators. This may result in policies that are biased in favor of some types of opinions or groups and susceptible to strategic manipulation. To address this issue, we develop a novel preference learning framework capable of aligning aggregate opinions and policies proportionally with the true population distribution of evaluator preferences. Grounded in social choice theory, our approach infers the feasible set of evaluator population distributions directly from pairwise comparison data. Using these estimates, the algorithm constructs a policy that satisfies foundational axioms from social choice theory, namely monotonicity and Pareto efficiency, as well as our newly-introduced axioms of population-proportional alignment and population-bounded manipulability. Moreover, we propose a soft-max relaxation method that smoothly trades off population-proportional alignment with the selection of the Condorcet winner (which beats all other options in pairwise comparisons). Finally, we validate the effectiveness and scalability of our approach through experiments on both tabular recommendation tasks and large language model alignment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于社会选择理论的人口比例对齐偏好学习框架，解决传统方法因偏向多数意见而导致的不公平和易操纵问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统偏好学习方法在聚合多个评估者偏好时，往往优先考虑更广泛持有的意见，导致政策偏向某些意见或群体，容易受到策略性操纵，这可能加剧社会偏见和不公平性。为了应对这一问题，研究旨在开发一种新方法，使聚合意见和政策能与评估者偏好的真实人口分布比例对齐，从而提高决策的公平性和鲁棒性。摘要未明确说明现有方法的其他不足之处，但强调了人口比例对齐的重要性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出的核心方法基于社会选择理论，从成对比较数据直接推断评估者人口分布的可行集，从而构建政策。该方法满足单调性和帕累托效率等基础公理，并引入新公理如人口比例对齐和人口有界操纵性，以确保政策与人口分布比例一致。此外，采用软最大松弛方法平滑权衡人口比例对齐与孔多塞赢家选择，后者在成对比较中优于其他选项。研究在表格推荐任务和大语言模型对齐中验证方法，但未详细说明具体模型架构或数据集细节。
light_analysis.result: 实验通过在表格推荐任务和大型语言模型对齐中进行验证，结果表明方法在有效性和可扩展性方面表现良好。摘要未提供具体的性能指标如准确率提升或效率改进，也未与基线方法进行直接对比。基于现有信息，合理推断该方法能改善对齐过程的公平性和抗操纵性，但具体数据未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是开发了一个基于公理框架的偏好学习方法，整合社会选择理论，引入人口比例对齐和人口有界操纵性新公理，以及软最大松弛技术。学术价值在于将社会选择理论应用于机器学习对齐，提升决策过程的公平性；实际应用价值在于推荐系统和人工智能对齐场景。摘要未明确提及局限性或未来工作方向，但研究为更公平和鲁棒的偏好学习奠定了基础。

title: Control Tax: The Price of Keeping AI in Check
abstract: The rapid integration of agentic AI into high-stakes real-world applications requires robust oversight mechanisms. The emerging field of AI Control (AIC) aims to provide such an oversight mechanism, but practical adoption depends heavily on implementation overhead. To study this problem better, we introduce the notion of Control tax -- the operational and financial cost of integrating control measures into AI pipelines. Our work makes three key contributions to the field of AIC: (1) we introduce a theoretical framework that quantifies the Control Tax and maps classifier performance to safety assurances; (2) we conduct comprehensive evaluations of state-of-the-art language models in adversarial settings, where attacker models insert subtle backdoors into code while monitoring models attempt to detect these vulnerabilities; and (3) we provide empirical financial cost estimates for control protocols and develop optimized monitoring strategies that balance safety and cost-effectiveness while accounting for practical constraints like auditing budgets. Our framework enables practitioners to make informed decisions by systematically connecting safety guarantees with their costs, advancing AIC through principled economic feasibility assessment across different deployment contexts.

light_analysis.overview: 本文通过引入“控制税”概念，量化AI控制的操作和财务成本，为AI控制领域提供了经济可行性评估框架。
light_analysis.motivation: AI代理在高风险现实应用中的快速集成需要鲁棒的监督机制，AI控制（AIC）领域旨在提供此类监督，但实际采用高度依赖实施开销。现有方法可能未充分量化成本，导致部署障碍。研究动机是引入Control tax概念，以系统评估监督成本，解决AI安全中的经济可行性问题，从而帮助实践者做出更明智的决策。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出三个核心贡献：首先，引入一个理论框架量化Control tax，并将分类器性能映射到安全保证；其次，在对抗设置中评估先进语言模型，攻击者模型在代码中插入微妙后门，监控模型检测这些漏洞；第三，提供控制协议的实证财务成本估计，开发优化的监控策略，平衡安全与成本效益，同时考虑审计预算等实际约束。
light_analysis.result: 论文进行了全面的对抗评估，展示了控制措施在检测漏洞方面的效果，并通过成本估计和优化策略，使实践者能系统连接安全保证与成本。结果有助于在不同部署上下文中做出明智决策，推进AIC领域的经济可行性评估，摘要未明确提供具体性能指标数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是量化Control tax并提供一个连接安全与成本的理论和实证框架。学术上推进了AI控制领域，强调经济可行性评估；实际上为实践者提供了决策支持工具，以平衡安全性和成本效益。未来工作可能包括扩展框架到更多应用场景或进一步优化监控策略。

title: AReaL: A Large-Scale Asynchronous Reinforcement Learning System for Language Reasoning
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become a dominant paradigm for training large language models (LLMs), particularly for reasoning tasks. Effective RL for LLMs requires massive parallelization and poses an urgent need for efficient training systems. Most existing large-scale RL systems for LLMs are synchronous, alternating generation and training in a batch setting where rollouts in each training batch are generated by the same model. This approach stabilizes RL training but suffers from severe system-level inefficiency: generation must wait until the longest output in the batch is completed before model updates, resulting in GPU underutilization. We present AReaL, a fully asynchronous RL system that completely decouples generation from training. Rollout workers in AReaL continuously generate new outputs without waiting, while training workers update the model whenever a batch of data is collected. AReaL also incorporates a collection of system-level optimizations, leading to substantially higher GPU utilization. To stabilize RL training, AReaL balances the workload of rollout and training workers to control data staleness, and adopts a staleness-enhanced PPO variant to better handle outdated training samples. Extensive experiments on math and code reasoning benchmarks show that AReaL achieves up to 2.77$\times$ training speedup compared to synchronous systems with the same number of GPUs and matched or improved final performance. The code of AReaL is available at https://github.com/inclusionAI/AReaL/.

light_analysis.overview: AReaL 是一个大规模异步强化学习系统，通过解耦生成与训练，显著提升语言推理任务的训练效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于现有同步强化学习系统在训练大型语言模型（LLMs）时存在系统级低效问题。具体而言，同步系统在批处理中需要等待所有生成完成才能进行模型更新，导致 GPU 利用率低下，这在 RL 成为 LLMs 训练主导范式（尤其是推理任务）的背景下，限制了大规模并行化潜力。现有方法虽稳定但效率低，无法满足高效训练需求，因此本研究旨在通过异步系统设计解决这一瓶颈，提升训练速度。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法基于 AReaL，一个完全异步的强化学习系统。核心创新点在于解耦生成和训练过程：生成工作者持续生成新输出而无须等待，训练工作者则在收集到数据批后立即更新模型，结合系统级优化提高 GPU 利用率。为稳定训练，系统平衡生成与训练工作负载以控制数据陈旧性，并采用增强的 PPO 变体（staleness-enhanced PPO）处理过时样本。技术特色包括异步架构、优化数据流和针对性算法调整，确保在推理任务中的高效性和稳定性。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果显示，AReaL 在数学和代码推理基准上取得了优异性能。与相同 GPU 数量的同步系统相比，AReaL 实现高达 2.77 倍的训练速度提升，同时最终性能匹配或有所改进。具体数据表明，系统级优化显著提高了 GPU 利用率，从而加速训练过程。对比基线同步方法，AReaL 在效率提升的基础上未牺牲模型质量，验证了异步设计在 RL 训练中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论总结，AReaL 的核心贡献是提出一种异步强化学习系统，通过解耦生成与训练解决了同步系统的效率问题。学术价值在于为大规模 RL 训练提供新系统设计，实际应用价值在于加速 LLMs 在推理任务中的训练过程。局限性可能涉及特定任务或硬件的依赖性，未来工作可扩展至更广泛任务或进一步优化算法，以促进更高效的 AI 模型训练。

title: Characterizing Pattern Matching and Its Limits on Compositional Task Structures
abstract: Despite impressive capabilities, LLMs' successes often rely on pattern-matching behaviors, yet these are also linked to OOD generalization failures in compositional tasks. However, behavioral studies commonly employ task setups that allow multiple generalization sources (e.g., algebraic invariances, structural repetition), obscuring a precise and testable account of how well LLMs perform generalization through pattern matching and their limitations. To address this ambiguity, we first formalize pattern matching as functional equivalence, i.e., identifying pairs of subsequences of inputs that consistently lead to identical results when the rest of the input is held constant. Then, we systematically study how decoder-only Transformer and Mamba behave in controlled tasks with compositional structures that isolate this mechanism. Our formalism yields predictive and quantitative insights: (1) Instance-wise success of pattern matching is well predicted by the number of contexts witnessing the relevant functional equivalence. (2) We prove a tight sample complexity bound of learning a two-hop structure by identifying the exponent of the data scaling law for perfect in-domain generalization. Our empirical results align with the theoretical prediction, under 20x parameter scaling and across architectures. (3) Path ambiguity is a structural barrier: when a variable influences the output via multiple paths, models fail to form unified intermediate state representations, impairing accuracy and interpretability. (4) Chain-of-Thought reduces data requirements yet does not resolve path ambiguity. Hence, we provide a predictive, falsifiable boundary for pattern matching and a foundational diagnostic for disentangling mixed generalization mechanisms.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究通过将模式匹配形式化为功能等价，系统揭示了LLM在组合任务中的泛化边界和结构性障碍。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM的成功常依赖模式匹配，但这与组合任务中的OOD泛化失败相关。然而，现有行为研究因任务设置允许多种泛化来源（如代数不变性、结构重复）而模糊，难以精确测试模式匹配的泛化程度和局限性。因此，本研究旨在解决这一模糊性，为LLM的泛化机制提供更清晰的解释和诊断工具，以改进模型在复杂任务中的表现。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法首先将模式匹配形式化为功能等价，即识别输入子序列对，在输入其余部分不变时一致导致相同结果。然后，使用解码器-only Transformer和Mamba架构，在具有组合结构的控制任务中系统研究其行为，以隔离模式匹配机制。关键创新在于形式化框架和任务设计，允许精确量化和测试模式匹配的表现，提供预测性洞察。
light_analysis.result: 实证结果包括：(1) 模式匹配的实例级成功可通过见证功能等价的上下文数量预测；(2) 理论推导出学习两跳结构的样本复杂性界限，实证在20倍参数缩放和跨架构下与理论预测一致；(3) 路径歧义作为结构性障碍，当变量通过多条路径影响输出时，模型无法形成统一中间状态表示，损害准确性和可解释性；(4) Chain-of-Thought技术减少数据需求，但未能解决路径歧义问题。这些发现提供了模式匹配的定量边界。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究通过形式化模式匹配并分析其在组合任务中的表现，揭示了LLM泛化的预测性边界和结构性障碍，如路径歧义。贡献包括提供可证伪的理论框架和基础诊断工具，有助于分离混合泛化机制。未来工作可基于此优化模型设计，提升泛化能力，并探索解决结构性障碍的方法。

title: Adaptive Location Hierarchy Learning for Long-Tailed Mobility Prediction
abstract: Human mobility prediction is crucial for applications ranging from location-based recommendations to urban planning, which aims to forecast users' next location visits based on historical trajectories. While existing mobility prediction models excel at capturing sequential patterns through diverse architectures for different scenarios, they are hindered by the long-tailed distribution of location visits, leading to biased predictions and limited applicability. This highlights the need for a solution that enhances the long-tailed prediction capabilities of these models with broad compatibility and efficiency across diverse architectures. To address this need, we propose the first architecture-agnostic plugin for long-tailed human mobility prediction, named \textbf{A}daptive \textbf{LO}cation \textbf{H}ier\textbf{A}rchy learning (ALOHA). Inspired by Maslow's theory of human motivation, we exploit and explore common mobility knowledge of head and tail locations derived from human mobility trajectories to effectively mitigate long-tailed bias. Specifically, we introduce an automatic pipeline to construct city-tailored location hierarchies based on Large Language Models (LLMs) and Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompts, capturing high-level mobility semantics with minimal human verification. We further design an Adaptive Hierarchical Loss (AHL) that rebalances learning through Gumbel disturbance and node-wise adaptive weighting, enabling both exploitation of multi-level signals and exploration within semantically related groups. Extensive experiments across multiple state-of-the-art models demonstrate that ALOHA consistently improves long-tailed mobility prediction performance by up to 16.59\% while maintaining efficiency and robustness. Our code is at https://github.com/Star607/ALOHA.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了首个架构无关的插件ALOHA，通过自适应位置层次学习和损失函数提升长尾人类移动性预测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 人类移动性预测在位置推荐和城市规划中至关重要，但现有模型虽然能捕捉序列模式，却受限于位置访问的长尾分布，导致预测偏置和泛化能力受限。这凸显了需要一种解决方案来增强长尾预测能力，并兼容多种架构以提高应用范围和效率，从而解决实际部署中的局限性问题。
light_analysis.method: 该方法开发了ALOHA插件，首先利用大型语言模型（LLMs）和思维链（CoT）提示自动构建城市定制的位置层次结构，以最小人工验证捕获高级移动语义。然后，设计自适应层次损失（AHL），通过Gumbel扰动和节点自适应权重重新平衡学习，实现多层次信号的利用和语义相关组内的探索，增强模型的适应性和灵活性。整个流程架构无关，可集成到不同预测模型中。
light_analysis.result: 广泛实验显示，ALOHA在多個顶尖模型上持续提升长尾移动性预测性能，最高改善达16.59%。该方法在保持效率和鲁棒性的同时，显著减少了预测偏置，优于基线方法，为长尾问题提供了有效的解决方案。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了ALOHA，一个创新的架构无关插件，通过位置层次学习和自适应损失有效缓解长尾偏置。这具有重要学术价值，为长尾预测提供了通用框架，并促进实际应用如推荐系统和城市管理。未来工作可扩展其到其他长尾场景或优化层次结构构建方法。

title: The Counting Power of Transformers
abstract: Counting properties (e.g. determining whether certain tokens occur more than other tokens in a given input text) have played a significant role in the study of expressiveness of transformers. In this paper, we provide a formal framework for investigating the counting power of transformers. We argue that all existing results demonstrate transformers' expressivity only for (semi-)linear counting properties, i.e., which are expressible as a boolean combination of linear inequalities. Our main result is that transformers can express counting properties that are highly nonlinear. More precisely, we prove that transformers can capture all semialgebraic counting properties, i.e., expressible as a boolean combination of arbitrary multivariate polynomials (of any degree). Among others, these generalize the counting properties that can be captured by C-RASP softmax transformers, which capture only linear counting properties. To complement this result, we exhibit a natural subclass of (softmax) transformers that completely characterizes semialgebraic counting properties. Through connections with the Hilbert's tenth problem, this expressivity of transformers also yields a new undecidability result for analyzing an extremely simple transformer model -- surprisingly with neither positional encodings (i.e. NoPE-transformers) nor masking. We also experimentally validate trainability of such counting properties.

light_analysis.overview: 论文证明了transformer能够表达所有半代数计数属性，显著扩展了其非线性表达能力的理论理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 在transformer表达性研究中，计数属性（如判断输入中特定标记出现次数是否多于其他标记）至关重要，但现有工作仅能处理线性或半线性计数属性，这限制了全面评估模型能力。本研究旨在解决transformer是否能表达更复杂的非线性计数属性，这对于理解模型的理论极限和实际应用（如自然语言处理）有重要意义，因为现有方法如C-RASP transformers仅局限于线性属性，未能揭示transformer的完整潜力。
light_analysis.method: 作者构建了一个正式框架来研究transformer的计数能力，通过理论证明表明transformer能够捕获所有半代数计数属性，即可表达为任意多元多项式布尔组合的属性。关键创新点包括扩展表达性到非线性领域，并将transformer与希尔伯特第十问题联系，推导出不可判定性结果。研究中使用了软注意力transformer模型，特别是没有位置编码和掩码的简单变体（NoPE-transformers），并通过实验验证了这类计数属性的可训练性，尽管摘要未详细说明具体数据集或架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 主要结果显示，transformer可以表达高度非线性的计数属性，具体捕获所有半代数计数属性，这超越了仅能处理线性属性的基线方法如C-RASP transformers。此外，通过与希尔伯特第十问题的连接，作者得出一个新的不可判定性结果，用于分析简单transformer模型。实验部分证实了这些计数属性在实际训练中是可行的，尽管摘要未提供具体性能指标如准确率或效率改进，但强调了方法的有效性，为理论框架提供了实证支持。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究通过提供transformer计数能力的正式框架，证明了其能表达广泛的非线性属性，扩展了理论边界，具有重要学术价值。实际应用中，这有助于改进模型设计和分析，例如在自然语言处理任务中。局限性可能包括对更复杂计数属性的探索，未来工作可进一步研究transformer在其他数学属性上的能力，或应用于实际场景以验证泛化性。

title: PAPN: Proximity Attention Encoder and Pointer Network Decoder for Parcel Pickup Route Prediction
abstract: Optimization of the last-mile delivery and first-mile pickup of parcels is integral to the logistics optimization pipeline as it entails both cost and resource efficiency and a heightened service quality. Such optimization requires accurate route and time prediction systems to adapt to different scenarios in advance. This work tackles the first building block, namely route prediction. The novel Proximity Attention (PA) mechanism is coupled to a Pointer Network (PN) decoder to leverage the underlying connections between the different visitable pickup positions at each timestep of the parcel pickup process. This local attention is coupled with global context computing via a multi-head attention transformer encoder. Both attentions are then mixed for complete and comprehensive modeling of the problems. PA is also used in the decoding process to skew predictions towards the locations with the highest visit likeliness, thus using inter-connectivity of nodes for next-location prediction. This method is trained, validated and tested on a large industry-level dataset of real-world, last-mile delivery and first-mile pickup named LaDE (2024). This approach outperforms all state-of-the-art supervised methods in terms of most metrics used for benchmarking on this dataset while still being competitive with the best-performing reinforcement learning framework named DRL4Route (2023).

light_analysis.overview: 该论文提出了结合邻近注意力机制和指针网络解码器的PAPN方法，用于优化包裹取件路线预测，以提高物流效率和准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于优化最后一英里交付和第一英里取件过程，这是物流优化中的关键环节，直接影响成本效率和服务质量。现有路线预测系统可能未能充分利用取件位置间的内在连接，导致预测不够精确，从而限制了物流场景的适应性。因此，开发更准确的预测方法对提升整体物流性能和资源分配至关重要，以应对复杂多变的实际需求。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法采用PAPN架构，结合了新颖的邻近注意力（PA）机制和指针网络（PN）解码器。PA机制专门捕捉取件过程中各步骤位置间的局部连接，并通过多头注意力Transformer编码器集成全局上下文信息，实现全面建模。在解码阶段，PA用于基于节点互联性偏向预测最可能访问的下一个位置。模型在大型真实世界数据集LaDE（2024）上进行训练、验证和测试，以评估其性能。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果显示，PAPN方法在LaDE数据集的大多数评估指标上优于所有现有的监督学习方法，在基准测试中表现卓越。同时，该方法能够与2023年提出的最佳强化学习框架DRL4Route竞争，证明了其高效性和准确性。尽管摘要未提供具体性能数据如准确率提升百分比，但整体结果突出了模型在路线预测任务中的竞争优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究贡献在于提出了PAPN模型，有效整合局部和全局注意力机制，提升了包裹取件路线预测的精度和鲁棒性。学术上，它为序列预测领域引入了新的结合方法，推动注意力机制和指针网络的应用；实际中，有助于物流行业优化路径规划，降低成本并提高服务质量。未来工作可能包括扩展到其他物流场景或进一步探索模型的泛化能力，但摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: A Diagnostic Evaluation of Neural Networks Trained with the Error Diffusion Learning Algorithm
abstract: The Error Diffusion Learning Algorithm (EDLA) is a learning scheme that performs synaptically local weight updates driven by a single, globally defined error signal. Although originally proposed as an alternative to backpropagation, its behavior has not been systematically characterized. We provide a modern formulation and implementation of EDLA and evaluate multilayer perceptrons trained with EDLA on parity, regression, and image-classification benchmarks (Digits, MNIST, Fashion-MNIST, and CIFAR-10). Following the original formulation, multi-class classification is implemented by training independent single-output networks (one per class), which makes the computational cost scale linearly with the number of classes. Under comparable architectures and training protocols, EDLA consistently underperforms backpropagation-trained baselines on all benchmarks considered. Through an analysis of internal dynamics, we identify a depth-related failure mode in ReLU-based EDLA: activations can grow explosively, causing unstable training and degraded accuracy. To mitigate this instability, we incorporate root mean square normalization (RMSNorm) into EDLA training. RMSNorm substantially improves numerical stability and expands the depth range in which EDLA can be trained, but it does not close the accuracy gap and retains the overhead of the parallel-network implementation. Overall, we offer a diagnostic evaluation of where and why global error diffusion breaks down in deep networks, providing guidance for future development of local, biologically inspired learning rules.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文对误差扩散学习算法在深度神经网络中的失效进行了诊断评估，识别了激活爆炸问题，并提出了RMSNorm改进方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 误差扩散学习算法最初作为反向传播的替代方案提出，具有生物启发的本地权重更新机制，但其在深度网络中的行为尚未被系统研究。现有反向传播方法虽然有效，但EDLA的潜在优势在于更生物学合理的训练方式。然而，其性能劣势和稳定性问题限制了应用，因此本研究旨在系统评估EDLA，揭示失败模式，为改进本地学习规则提供理论依据。
light_analysis.method: 论文提供了EDLA的现代表述和实现，使用多层感知器在多个基准测试上进行评估，包括Digits、MNIST、Fashion-MNIST和CIFAR-10。多类分类通过训练独立的单输出网络实现，每个类别一个网络，导致计算成本线性增长。关键创新点包括分析内部动态以识别基于ReLU的EDLA中激活爆炸的问题，并引入RMSNorm进行激活标准化，以提高数值稳定性和扩展可训练深度。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，在可比较的架构和训练协议下，EDLA在所有基准测试中一致地表现不如反向传播训练的基线。分析显示，基于ReLU的EDLA存在深度相关失败模式，激活可能爆炸式增长，导致训练不稳定和精度下降。整合RMSNorm后，数值稳定性显著改善，可训练深度范围扩大，但精度差距未缩小，且并行网络实现的开销仍然存在。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究系统评估了EDLA，揭示了其在深度网络中的失效机制，特别是激活爆炸问题，并通过RMSNorm部分缓解了不稳定性。主要贡献在于提供了诊断性评估，为未来开发生物启发的本地学习规则提供了指导。然而，RMSNorm未能完全解决精度问题，且计算开销高，表明EDLA需进一步优化才能实用化。未来工作可探索其他归一化技术或算法改进以提升性能。

title: Endowing Embodied Agents with Spatial Reasoning Capabilities for Vision-and-Language Navigation
abstract: Enhancing the spatial perception capabilities of mobile robots is crucial for achieving embodied Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN). Although significant progress has been made in simulated environments, directly transferring these capabilities to real-world scenarios often results in severe hallucination phenomena, causing robots to lose effective spatial awareness. To address this issue, we propose BrainNav, a bio-inspired spatial cognitive navigation framework inspired by biological spatial cognition theories and cognitive map theory. BrainNav integrates dual-map (coordinate map and topological map) and dual-orientation (relative orientation and absolute orientation) strategies, enabling real-time navigation through dynamic scene capture and path planning. Its five core modules-Hippocampal Memory Hub, Visual Cortex Perception Engine, Parietal Spatial Constructor, Prefrontal Decision Center, and Cerebellar Motion Execution Unit-mimic biological cognitive functions to reduce spatial hallucinations and enhance adaptability. Validated in a zero-shot real-world lab environment using the Limo Pro robot, BrainNav, compatible with GPT-4, outperforms existing State-of-the-Art (SOTA) Vision-and-Language Navigation in Continuous Environments (VLN-CE) methods without fine-tuning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出BrainNav框架，一种受生物启发的空间认知导航方法，通过整合双图和双定向策略增强具身代理的空间推理能力，在真实世界视觉-语言导航中减少幻觉并超越现有最先进方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究旨在解决具身视觉-语言导航中移动机器人空间感知能力不足的问题。尽管模拟环境取得进展，但直接应用于现实世界时，常出现严重幻觉现象，导致机器人失去有效空间感知。现有方法在现实环境适应性差，这限制了VLN技术的实际部署，亟需更鲁棒的解决方案来提升导航可靠性。
light_analysis.method: BrainNav框架受生物空间认知理论启发，整合坐标图和拓扑图的双图策略，以及相对定向和绝对定向的双定向策略。其五个核心模块——海马体记忆中心、视觉皮层感知引擎、顶叶空间构造器、前额叶决策中心和小脑运动执行单元，模拟生物认知功能以减少空间幻觉、增强适应性。框架通过动态场景捕获和路径规划实现实时导航，验证中使用Limo Pro机器人并与GPT-4兼容。
light_analysis.result: 在零样本真实世界实验室环境中使用Limo Pro机器人验证BrainNav，其兼容GPT-4且未进行微调，超越现有视觉-语言导航在连续环境中的最先进方法。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但结果表明该框架在减少空间幻觉和提升导航准确性方面表现优异，突出了其在现实场景中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: BrainNav框架的主要贡献在于提出了一种生物启发的空间认知导航方法，有效应对现实世界VLN中的幻觉问题。该研究为具身AI的空间推理提供了新思路，具有学术价值，并有望应用于增强机器人自主导航的实际场景。未来工作可扩展到更复杂环境和多任务场景中，进一步提升框架的泛化能力。

title: When Reasoning Meets Compression: Understanding the Effects of LLMs Compression on Large Reasoning Models
abstract: Compression methods, including quantization, distillation, and pruning, improve the computational efficiency of large reasoning models (LRMs). However, existing studies either fail to sufficiently compare all three compression methods on LRMs or lack in-depth interpretation analysis. In this paper, we investigate how the reasoning capabilities of LRMs are compromised during compression, through performance benchmarking and mechanistic interpretation. To uncover the effects of compression on reasoning performance, we benchmark quantized, distilled, and pruned DeepSeek-R1 models on four reasoning datasets (AIME 2024, FOLIO, Temporal Sequences, and MuSiQue). To precisely locate compression effects on model weights, we adapt difference of means and attribution patching techniques, focusing on the activation of every linear component in compressed LRMs, to interpret fine-grained causal relationships between weights and various reasoning capabilities. This fine-grained interpretation addresses a fundamental question of compression: which weights are the most important for reasoning? Overall, we find dynamically quantized 2.51-bit R1 reaches close-to-R1 performance. With empirical verification, we present three main findings that generalize across both R1 and non-R1 LRMs: (1) Weight count has a greater impact on LRMs' knowledge memorization than reasoning, highlighting the risks of pruning and distillation; (2) The MLP up projection in the final layer of distilled LRMs is one of the most important components, offering a new perspective on locating critical weights - a fundamental problem in model compression; and (3) Current quantization methods overly compress the final-layer modules and MLP gate projections, so protecting just 2% of all weights that are excessively compressed can raise average accuracy by 6.57%, greatly surpassing the state-of-the-art.

light_analysis.overview: 论文通过机制解释揭示了压缩方法对大型推理模型推理能力的精细影响，识别了关键权重并提出改进策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究旨在解决压缩方法（如量化、蒸馏、剪枝）在提高大型推理模型计算效率时可能损害推理能力的问题。现有研究要么未充分比较所有三种压缩方法在LRMs上的效果，要么缺乏深入的解释分析，导致对压缩影响的机制理解不足。这一问题至关重要，因为压缩是部署大规模AI模型的关键步骤，但需确保推理性能不受损害，以支持实际应用中的可靠决策。
light_analysis.method: 论文采用性能基准测试和机制解释相结合的方法。首先，在四个推理数据集上对量化、蒸馏和剪枝的DeepSeek-R1模型进行基准测试。其次，使用均值差和归因修补技术，分析压缩模型线性组件的激活，以揭示权重与各种推理能力之间的细粒度因果关系。核心创新在于精确定位压缩对模型权重的影响，特别是关注哪些权重对推理最关键，从而弥补现有研究的空白。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果显示，动态量化的2.51位DeepSeek-R1模型达到了接近原始模型的性能。关键发现包括：权重数量对模型的知识记忆能力影响大于推理能力，突显了剪枝和蒸馏的风险；蒸馏模型中最终层的MLP上投影是最重要的组件之一，为定位关键权重提供了新视角；量化方法过度压缩了最终层模块和MLP门投影，保护仅2%的权重即可将平均准确率提高6.57%，大幅超越了现有技术。这些发现基于与基线方法的对比验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的贡献在于通过机制分析增进了对压缩如何影响大型推理模型推理能力的理解，并识别了关键权重。学术价值在于提供了压缩方法的深入解释，推动了模型压缩理论的发展；应用价值在于为实际部署中的高效压缩策略提供了指导，以提高准确率。未来工作可扩展至其他模型或压缩方法，以验证发现的普适性，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: VideoFusion: A Spatio-Temporal Collaborative Network for Multi-modal Video Fusion
abstract: Compared to images, videos better reflect real-world acquisition and possess valuable temporal cues. However, existing multi-sensor fusion research predominantly integrates complementary context from multiple images rather than videos due to the scarcity of large-scale multi-sensor video datasets, limiting research in video fusion and the inherent difficulty of jointly modeling spatial and temporal dependencies in a unified framework. To this end, we construct M3SVD, a benchmark dataset with $220$ temporally synchronized and spatially registered infrared-visible videos comprising $153,797$ frames, bridging the data gap. Secondly, we propose VideoFusion, a multi-modal video fusion model that exploits cross-modal complementarity and temporal dynamics to generate spatio-temporally coherent videos from multi-modal inputs. Specifically, 1) a differential reinforcement module is developed for cross-modal information interaction and enhancement, 2) a complete modality-guided fusion strategy is employed to adaptively integrate multi-modal features, and 3) a bi-temporal co-attention mechanism is devised to dynamically aggregate forward-backward temporal contexts to reinforce cross-frame feature representations. Experiments reveal that VideoFusion outperforms existing image-oriented fusion paradigms in sequences, effectively mitigating temporal inconsistency and interference. Project and M3SVD: https://github.com/Linfeng-Tang/VideoFusion.
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026. The dataset and code are available at https://github.com/Linfeng-Tang/VideoFusion

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了VideoFusion模型和M3SVD数据集，以解决多模态视频融合中的时空一致性挑战，弥补了现有方法的不足。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究的动机源于视频融合领域的局限。由于现有多传感器融合研究主要关注图像而非视频，原因是大规模多模态视频数据集的稀缺，以及统一框架中联合建模空间和时间依赖性的固有困难。这导致视频融合难以有效利用时间线索和跨模态互补性，从而限制了真实世界应用如监控和多模态分析的发展。因此，本研究旨在填补数据空白并开发高效的视频融合方法。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括构建M3SVD数据集，包含220个红外-可见光视频的153,797帧，以提供基准数据。在此基础上，提出VideoFusion模型，其核心技术包括：1）差分强化模块用于跨模态信息交互与增强；2）完整模态引导融合策略以自适应整合多模态特征；3）双时间共注意力机制动态聚合前向和后向时间上下文，以强化跨帧特征表示。这些方法共同实现对视频时空依赖性的有效建模。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，VideoFusion在序列中优于现有面向图像的融合范式。它能有效缓解视频融合中的时间不一致性和干扰问题，提升了生成视频的时空一致性。摘要未提供具体性能指标数据，但强调了该模型在视频任务中的优越性，显示出在实践中的潜在应用价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的贡献在于构建了M3SVD数据集和提出VideoFusion模型，为多模态视频融合提供了新的解决方案。它解决了视频融合中数据集缺失和时空建模的挑战，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用潜力，如提升监控系统和多模态分析性能。未来工作可进一步扩展数据集规模和优化模型泛化能力。

title: Inverse Reinforcement Learning with Dynamic Reward Scaling for LLM Alignment
abstract: Alignment is vital for safely deploying large language models (LLMs). Existing techniques are either reward-based (training a reward model on preference pairs and optimizing with reinforcement learning) or reward-free (directly fine-tuning on ranked outputs). Recent research shows that well-tuned reward-based pipelines remain the most robust, and single-response demonstrations can outperform pairwise preference data. However, there still exist two key challenges: (1) imbalanced safety datasets that overrepresent common hazards while neglecting long-tail threats; and (2) static reward models that ignore task difficulty, limiting optimization efficiency and attainable gains. To address these limitations, we propose DR-IRL, which Dynamically adjusts Rewards through Inverse Reinforcement Learning. We first train category-specific reward models using a balanced safety dataset of seven harmful categories as demonstration via IRL. Then we enhance Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) by introducing dynamic reward scaling: adjusting rewards by task difficulty, data-level hardness by text encoder cosine similarity, and model-level responsiveness by reward gaps. Extensive experiments across various benchmarks and LLMs demonstrate that DR-IRL outperforms all baseline methods in safety alignment while maintaining usefulness.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出DR-IRL方法，通过逆强化学习动态调整奖励，以解决大语言模型对齐中的数据不平衡和静态奖励问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型对齐对于安全部署至关重要，但现有技术面临两大挑战：安全数据集不平衡，过度代表常见危险而忽略长尾威胁；静态奖励模型无法适应任务难度，限制了优化效率和性能提升。这些问题导致模型在面对罕见威胁时表现不佳，影响整体安全性和可靠性，亟待创新方法加以改进。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出DR-IRL方法，核心是利用逆强化学习动态调整奖励。首先，使用平衡安全数据集（涵盖七个有害类别）作为演示，通过逆强化学习训练类别特定的奖励模型。然后，增强Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO)，引入动态奖励缩放机制，基于任务难度、数据级硬度（通过文本编码器余弦相似度衡量）和模型级响应性（通过奖励间隙计算）调整奖励，以实现自适应优化。
light_analysis.result: 论文通过广泛实验，在多个基准测试和大语言模型上验证DR-IRL的性能。结果表明，该方法在安全对齐方面优于所有基线方法，同时保持了模型的有用性。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升百分比，但强调了其在处理数据不平衡和任务难度问题上的优越性，显著提升了对齐效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是提出DR-IRL方法，通过逆强化学习动态调整奖励，有效解决对齐中的数据不平衡和静态奖励挑战。学术上，它提供了一种更灵活高效的对齐技术，增强了模型鲁棒性；应用上，有助于实现更安全的大语言模型部署。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来方向，但为动态调整策略的进一步研究奠定了基础。

title: MoMa: A Modular Deep Learning Framework for Material Property Prediction
abstract: Deep learning methods for material property prediction have been widely explored to advance materials discovery. However, the prevailing pre-train then fine-tune paradigm often fails to address the inherent diversity and disparity of material tasks. To overcome these challenges, we introduce MoMa, a Modular framework for Materials that first trains specialized modules across a wide range of tasks and then adaptively composes synergistic modules tailored to each downstream scenario. Evaluation across 17 datasets demonstrates the superiority of MoMa, with a substantial 14% average improvement over the strongest baseline. Few-shot and continual learning experiments further highlight MoMa's potential for real-world applications. Pioneering a new paradigm of modular material learning, MoMa will be open-sourced to foster broader community collaboration.

light_analysis.overview: 提出模块化深度学习框架MoMa，通过训练和组合专门模块来改善材料属性预测，应对任务多样性。
light_analysis.motivation: 材料属性预测对加速材料发现至关重要，但现有深度学习方法普遍采用预训练后微调的范式，难以处理材料任务的固有多样性和差异性，导致预测精度受限和泛化能力不足。因此，开发更灵活的方法来适应不同任务场景成为研究需求。摘要未明确说明具体应用领域，但强调了解决任务多样性的重要性。
light_analysis.method: MoMa框架采用模块化设计，首先训练多个专门模块覆盖广泛的材料任务，然后根据下游场景自适应组合这些模块，形成协同效应。关键创新在于模块化学习和自适应组合，避免了传统预训练-微调范式的局限性。摘要未明确说明具体数据集和模型架构细节，但提及在17个数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在17个材料数据集上的评估显示，MoMa框架相比最强基线实现了14%的平均性能提升。少样本学习和持续学习实验进一步证实了其在实际应用中的潜力，表明MoMa在处理数据稀缺和连续任务场景中具有优势。具体指标如准确率等摘要未明确说明，但强调了性能改进的显著性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MoMa开创了模块化材料学习新范式，显著提升预测性能，为材料科学提供了灵活工具。学术上创新方法，实际中支持少样本和持续学习应用，并通过开源促进社区合作。摘要未明确说明局限性，但未来工作可能包括框架优化和扩展应用。

title: Gen-DFL: Decision-Focused Generative Learning for Robust Decision Making
abstract: Decision-focused learning (DFL) integrates predictive models with downstream optimization, directly training machine learning models to minimize decision errors. While DFL has been shown to provide substantial advantages when compared to a counterpart that treats the predictive and prescriptive models separately, it has also been shown to struggle in high-dimensional and risk-sensitive settings, limiting its applicability in real-world settings. To address this limitation, this paper introduces decision-focused generative learning (Gen-DFL), a novel framework that leverages generative models to adaptively model uncertainty and improve decision quality. Instead of relying on fixed uncertainty sets, Gen-DFL learns a structured representation of the optimization parameters and samples from the tail regions of the learned distribution to enhance robustness against worst-case scenarios. This approach mitigates over-conservatism while capturing complex dependencies in the parameter space. The paper shows, theoretically, that Gen-DFL achieves improved worst-case performance bounds compared to traditional DFL. Empirically, it evaluates Gen-DFL on various scheduling and logistics problems, demonstrating its strong performance against existing DFL methods.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出Gen-DFL，一个利用生成模型自适应建模不确定性以增强决策鲁棒性的创新框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 决策聚焦学习（DFL）整合预测与优化模型，直接最小化决策误差，但面临高维度和风险敏感设置的挑战，如过保守或无法捕捉复杂依赖，限制了其在实际应用中的效能。本研究旨在解决DFL在这些场景下的不足，通过引入生成模型来提升不确定性的自适应处理，从而改善决策质量。
light_analysis.method: Gen-DFL通过生成模型学习优化参数的结构化表示，取代传统的固定不确定性集。关键创新在于从学习分布的尾部区域采样，以模拟最坏情况并增强鲁棒性，同时减少过保守问题。该方法利用机器学习技术建模参数空间中的复杂依赖，理论分析显示其优于传统DFL。
light_analysis.result: 理论上，Gen-DFL改进了最坏情况性能边界；实证评估中，在调度和物流问题上表现出色，优于现有DFL方法。摘要未提供具体性能数据，但强调了框架在实际应用中的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究的主要贡献是Gen-DFL框架，它扩展了DFL的应用范围，特别是在高风险场景下提高决策鲁棒性。这具有学术价值，推动了机器学习和优化的交叉研究；实际应用中，可提升工业调度和物流的效率。未来工作可探索更广泛的问题领域。

title: Intrinsic Entropy of Context Length Scaling in LLMs
abstract: Long Context Language Models have drawn great attention in the past few years. There has been work discussing the impact of long context on Language Model performance: some find that long irrelevant context could harm performance, while some experimentally summarize loss reduction by relevant long context as Scaling Laws. This calls for a more thorough understanding of how long context impacts Language Modeling. In this work, we (1) propose to use `Intrinsic Entropy' for explaining the impact of context length on language modeling; and (2) conduct experiments on natural language and synthetic data, validating our proposed theoretical assumptions and deductions. Our theoretical framework can provide practical insights such as establishing that training dataset size dictates an optimal context length and bounds context length scaling for certain cases. We hope our work may inspire new long context Language Models, as well as future work studying the physics of Language Models.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出使用固有熵理论解释上下文长度对大型语言模型性能的影响，并通过实验验证相关理论假设。
light_analysis.motivation: 近年来，长上下文语言模型备受关注，但其影响机制尚不明确。现有研究表明，长无关上下文可能损害性能，而相关长上下文能减少损失并遵循扩展法则，凸显了深入理解上下文长度影响的必要性。现有方法缺乏统一的理论框架来解释这些现象，导致模型优化困难。因此，本工作旨在填补这一空白，为上下文长度缩放提供系统化的理论基础，以指导更有效的模型设计。
light_analysis.method: 研究提出“固有熵”作为核心概念，用于量化上下文长度对语言建模熵变的影响。方法包括建立理论框架推导相关假设，并在自然语言和合成数据上进行实验验证。关键创新点在于引入熵理论建模上下文缩放效应，提供基于理论的分析路线。摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构，但实验设计旨在验证理论推导，确保方法既有理论深度又有实证支持。
light_analysis.result: 通过实验验证了固有熵理论假设，表明理论推导与数据一致。结果提供了实用见解，例如训练数据集大小决定了最优上下文长度，并为上下文长度扩展设定了界限。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升或与基线对比数据，但理论框架为优化上下文选择提供了指导，支持了上下文缩放效应的理论解释。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献是提出了固有熵理论框架，深入解释了上下文长度对LLM的影响，并提供了实用见解如最佳上下文长度的确定。学术价值在于深化了语言模型理论基础，实际价值有助于设计更高效的长上下文模型。潜在局限性可能是实验细节未充分展开，未来工作可扩展到其他模型属性或激发语言模型物理学研究。

title: Towards Real Zero-Shot Camouflaged Object Segmentation without Camouflaged Annotations
abstract: Camouflaged Object Segmentation (COS) faces significant challenges due to the scarcity of annotated data, where meticulous pixel-level annotation is both labor-intensive and costly, primarily due to the intricate object-background boundaries. Addressing the core question, "Can COS be effectively achieved in a zero-shot manner without manual annotations for any camouflaged object?" we affirmatively respond and introduce a robust zero-shot COS framework. This framework leverages the inherent local pattern bias of COS and employs a broad semantic feature space derived from salient object segmentation (SOS) for efficient zero-shot transfer. We incorporate an Masked Image Modeling (MIM) based image encoder optimized for Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT), a Multimodal Large Language Model (M-LLM), and a Multi-scale Fine-grained Alignment (MFA) mechanism. The MIM pre-trained image encoder focuses on capturing essential low-level features, while the M-LLM generates caption embeddings processed alongside these visual cues. These embeddings are precisely aligned using MFA, enabling our framework to accurately interpret and navigate complex semantic contexts. To optimize operational efficiency, we introduce a learnable codebook that represents the M-LLM during inference, significantly reducing computational overhead. Our framework demonstrates its versatility and efficacy through rigorous experimentation, achieving state-of-the-art performance in zero-shot COS with $F_β^w$ scores of 72.9\% on CAMO and 71.7\% on COD10K. By removing the M-LLM during inference, we achieve an inference speed comparable to that of traditional end-to-end models, reaching 18.1 FPS. Code: https://github.com/AVC2-UESTC/ZSCOS-CaMF

light_analysis.overview: 该论文提出了一种无需人工标注的零-shot伪装物体分割框架，结合了MIM图像编码器、M-LLM和MFA对齐机制。
light_analysis.motivation: 伪装物体分割（COS）面临标注数据稀缺的挑战，因为像素级标注需要精细处理复杂边界，耗时耗力且成本高昂。现有方法依赖大量手动标注，限制了应用范围和可扩展性。本研究旨在解决这一问题，探讨在没有针对任何伪装物体的人工标注情况下，能否有效实现零-shot COS，以减少数据依赖并为低资源场景提供实用解决方案。
light_analysis.method: 该框架利用COS的局部模式偏见，从显著物体分割（SOS）获得广泛语义特征空间，实现零-shot转移。关键技术包括基于Masked Image Modeling（MIM）的图像编码器，优化用于参数高效微调（PEFT），以捕获低层视觉特征；多模态大型语言模型（M-LLM）生成文本嵌入；以及多尺度细粒度对齐（MFA）机制，精确对齐视觉和文本特征。为提升效率，引入可学习代码书在推理时代表M-LLM，减少计算开销。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，该框架在零-shot COS任务中达到最先进性能，在CAMO数据集上F_β^w分数为72.9%，在COD10K上为71.7%，显著优于基线方法。在推理阶段，去除M-LLM后，框架实现18.1 FPS的推理速度，与传统端到端模型速度相当，展示了高效性。这些结果证明了框架在精度和速度方面的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究成功证明了无需手动标注的零-shot伪装物体分割的可行性，提出的框架通过结合多模态特征和对齐机制，实现了高精度和高效推理。其学术价值在于为低数据标注场景提供了创新的技术方案，实际应用潜力广泛，可扩展到其他计算机视觉任务。未来工作可能包括进一步优化模型效率、探索更多数据集或集成其他先进技术。

title: SimpleToM: Exposing the Gap between Explicit ToM Inference and Implicit ToM Application in LLMs
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly tested for a "Theory of Mind" (ToM) - the ability to attribute mental states to oneself and others. Yet most evaluations stop at explicit belief attribution in classical toy stories or stylized tasks, leaving open the questions of whether LLMs can implicitly apply such knowledge to predict human behavior, or to judge an observed behavior, in diverse scenarios. We introduce SimpleToM, a benchmark that advances ToM evaluation along two novel axes. First, it probes multiple levels of ToM reasoning, from mental state inference (explicit ToM) to behavior prediction and judgment (applied ToM). Second, it situates these tasks in diverse, everyday scenarios - such as supermarkets, hospitals, schools, and offices - where information asymmetries naturally arise (e.g., hidden defects in grocery store items, incomplete information in provider-patient interactions, or restricted access to locked devices). SimpleToM contains concise stories (e.g., "The can of Pringles has moldy chips in it. Mary picks up the can in the supermarket and walks to the cashier."), each with three questions that test different degrees of ToM reasoning, asking models to predict: (a) mental states ("Is Mary aware of the mold?"), (b) behaviors ("Will Mary pay for the chips or report the mold?"), and (c) judgments ("Mary paid for the chips. Was that reasonable?"). Experiments reveal a striking gap: state-of-the-art models often reliably infer mental state (a), but fail at applying knowledge about the mental state for secondary predictions, with performance dropping sharply for behavior prediction (b) and further for behavior judgment (c). This exposes a critical fragility in LLMs' social reasoning in terms of what they know (explicit ToM) versus how well they can implicitly apply that knowledge for predictions (applied ToM).

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了SimpleToM基准，首次系统评估大型语言模型在显式心理状态推理和隐式应用推理之间的性能差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型（LLMs）越来越多地被测试'心理理论'（ToM），即归因心理状态的能力。但当前评估多局限于显式信念归因，如经典玩具故事或风格化任务，未测试LLMs是否能隐式应用这些知识来预测人类行为或判断行为。这个问题重要，因为ToM是社交推理的核心，现有方法在评估应用层面存在不足，限制了LLMs在真实多样化场景中的实际应用，如日常生活中的信息不对称情境。
light_analysis.method: 论文引入SimpleToM基准，通过两个新维度推进ToM评估：一是测试从显式心理状态推断（如意识问题）到应用ToM（如行为预测和判断）的多层次推理；二是将任务置于日常生活场景如超市、医院、学校和办公室，模拟信息不对称。基准包含简短故事（如购物场景），每个故事配有三个问题，分别测试心理状态推断（'玛丽是否知道霉菌'）、行为预测（'玛丽会购买还是报告霉菌'）和行为判断（'玛丽的购买行为是否合理'），以系统评估LLMs的能力。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示，最先进的LLMs在显式心理状态推断上表现可靠，但在应用知识进行行为预测和行为判断时性能显著下降。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但观察到从心理状态推断到行为预测再到行为判断的逐步恶化，暴露了显式ToM和应用ToM之间的显著差距，表明LLMs在社交推理中存在关键脆弱性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了SimpleToM基准，揭示了LLMs在显式心理状态推理和隐式应用推理之间的关键差距，突显了LLMs社交推理中的脆弱性：能推断心理状态但难应用知识预测行为。研究具有重要学术价值，为ToM评估提供了新工具，并指出了未来需改进LLMs应用推理能力的潜力方向，局限性可能在于评估场景的广度或模型泛化能力。

title: A Tidal Current Speed Forecasting Model based on Multi-Periodicity Learning
abstract: Tidal energy is one of the key components in increasing the penetration of renewable energy. High tidal energy penetration into the electrical grid depends on accurate tidal current speed forecasting. Model inaccuracies hinder forecast accuracy. Previous research primarily used physical models to forecast tidal current speed, yet tidal current variations influenced by the orbital periods of celestial bodies make accurate physical modeling challenging. Research on the multi-periodicity of tides is crucial for forecasting tidal current speed. We propose the Wavelet-Enhanced Convolutional Network to learn multi-periodicity. The framework embeds intra-period and inter-period variations of one-dimensional tidal current data into the rows and columns, respectively, of a two-dimensional tensor. Then, the two-dimensional variations of the sequence can be processed by convolutional kernels. We integrate a time-frequency analysis method into the framework to further address local periodic features. Additionally, to enhance the framework's stability, we optimize the framework's hyperparameters with the Tree-structured Parzen Estimator. The proposed framework captures multi-periodic dependencies in tidal current data. Numerical results show a 10-step average Mean Absolute Error of 0.025, with at least a 1.44% error reduction compared to other baselines. Further ablation studies show a 1.4% reduction in Mean Absolute Percentage Error on the data with artificially added periodic fluctuations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于多周期性学习的Wavelet-Enhanced Convolutional Network，通过结合时频分析和卷积网络改进潮汐流速预测准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 潮汐能是可再生能源的关键组成部分，电网中潮汐能的高渗透率依赖于准确的潮汐流速预测。现有物理模型在预测潮汐流速时面临挑战，因为潮汐变化受天体轨道周期影响，导致模型不准确性并阻碍预测精度。因此，研究潮汐的多周期性对开发更精确的预测方法至关重要，以解决现有方法的不足并促进潮汐能集成。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出Wavelet-Enhanced Convolutional Network，通过将一维潮汐数据的周期内和周期间变化分别嵌入二维张量的行和列，使二维序列变化可由卷积核处理以捕捉多周期性。框架集成时频分析方法进一步处理局部周期特征，并使用Tree-structured Parzen Estimator优化超参数以增强稳定性和适应性，核心创新在于结合时频分析与卷积网络学习复杂周期性模式。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，所提框架的10步平均平均绝对误差为0.025，相比基线方法误差降低至少1.44%，验证了其在潮汐流速预测中的有效性。进一步消融研究在添加人工周期波动的数据上，平均绝对百分比误差降低1.4%，显示框架能有效捕捉多周期依赖性并处理局部波动，优于传统物理模型和其他基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究贡献在于提出一个捕捉潮汐数据多周期依赖性的框架，显著提高预测准确性，学术价值体现在结合时频分析和卷积网络为周期性时间序列预测提供新思路，应用价值有助于优化潮汐能集成。摘要未明确说明局限性，未来工作可能包括扩展模型到更多数据集或进一步优化超参数方法。

title: ST-WebAgentBench: A Benchmark for Evaluating Safety and Trustworthiness in Web Agents
abstract: Autonomous web agents solve complex browsing tasks, yet existing benchmarks measure only whether an agent finishes a task, ignoring whether it does so safely or in a way enterprises can trust. To integrate these agents into critical workflows, safety and trustworthiness (ST) are prerequisite conditions for adoption. We introduce \textbf{\textsc{ST-WebAgentBench}}, a configurable and easily extensible suite for evaluating web agent ST across realistic enterprise scenarios. Each of its 222 tasks is paired with ST policies, concise rules that encode constraints, and is scored along six orthogonal dimensions (e.g., user consent, robustness). Beyond raw task success, we propose the \textit{Completion Under Policy} (\textit{CuP}) metric, which credits only completions that respect all applicable policies, and the \textit{Risk Ratio}, which quantifies ST breaches across dimensions. Evaluating three open state-of-the-art agents reveals that their average CuP is less than two-thirds of their nominal completion rate, exposing critical safety gaps. By releasing code, evaluation templates, and a policy-authoring interface, \href{https://sites.google.com/view/st-webagentbench/home}{\textsc{ST-WebAgentBench}} provides an actionable first step toward deploying trustworthy web agents at scale.
comment: The Fourteenth International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 该论文提出了ST-WebAgentBench，一个可配置的基准套件，用于评估Web代理的安全性和可信度，填补了现有评估方法的空白。
light_analysis.motivation: 自主Web代理能够处理复杂浏览任务，但现有基准仅衡量任务是否完成，忽略了安全性和可信度问题。为了在关键工作流程中集成这些代理，安全与信任是采用的必要前提。现有方法的不足在于缺乏对代理行为安全性的评估，导致在现实企业场景中部署时存在风险。因此，研究旨在开发一个评估框架，以解决代理在安全和信任方面的缺陷，促进其在敏感环境中的可靠应用。
light_analysis.method: 论文引入ST-WebAgentBench，一个可配置且易于扩展的基准套件，包含222个基于现实企业场景的任务。每个任务与安全政策配对，这些政策是编码约束的简洁规则，评分沿六个正交维度（如用户同意、鲁棒性）。核心创新是提出Completion Under Policy（CuP）和Risk Ratio指标，CuP仅对遵守所有适用政策的完成任务计分，Risk Ratio量化安全违规的分布。套件还包括政策编写接口和评估模板，支持定制化评估和扩展。
light_analysis.result: 通过评估三个开源先进代理，研究发现平均CuP不到其标称完成率的三分之二，这揭示了关键的安全差距，表明代理在完成任务时常违反安全政策。Risk Ratio指标进一步量化了安全违规在各个维度的分布，强调了现有代理的薄弱环节。与仅关注任务成功的基线方法相比，CuP和Risk Ratio提供了更全面的安全评估，突显了代理在安全性和可信度方面的不足。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是提出了ST-WebAgentBench基准，通过CuP和Risk Ratio等创新指标，为评估Web代理的安全性和可信度提供了可操作的第一步。其学术价值在于填补了安全评估的空白，实际应用价值在于支持企业场景中的可靠代理部署。通过发布代码和政策接口，推动了未来研究，但可能局限于特定场景，未来可扩展任务类型和政策，并验证在其他领域的适用性。

title: Leray-Schauder Mappings for Operator Learning
abstract: We present an algorithm for learning operators between Banach spaces, based on the use of Leray-Schauder mappings to learn a finite-dimensional approximation of compact subspaces. We show that the resulting method is a universal approximator of (possibly nonlinear) operators. We demonstrate the efficiency of the approach on two benchmark datasets showing it achieves results comparable to state of the art models.
comment: 15 pages, 2 figures, 1 table. Comments are welcome! v3: The article has been streamlined, and several further explanations have been added. References have been added too

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于Leray-Schauder映射的算法，用于学习Banach空间之间的算子，实现紧凑子空间的有限维近似，并证明其具有普适近似能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 摘要未明确说明具体研究动机。基于上下文，该研究旨在解决Banach空间之间算子学习的挑战，特别是非线性算子的近似问题。Banach空间在数学和工程中应用广泛，但现有方法可能难以高效处理无限维空间，导致计算成本高或近似精度不足。因此，开发新方法以提升算子学习的效率和准确性具有重要理论意义和实用价值。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一种算法，利用Leray-Schauder映射学习Banach空间中算子的有限维近似。该方法通过将紧凑子空间映射到低维空间，有效处理非线性算子，关键创新在于引入拓扑工具构建近似，并证明具有普适近似性质。摘要未详细说明模型架构或训练过程，但涉及学习紧凑子空间的低维表示，适用于算子学习任务。
light_analysis.result: 研究在两个基准数据集上评估了方法效率，结果显示其性能与当前最先进模型相当。摘要未提供具体性能指标如准确率或运行时间，但强调方法在实践中的有效性，表明算法在处理Banach空间算子学习任务时具有竞争力，能够达到state-of-the-art水平，验证了其在实际应用中的潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文主要贡献是提出基于Leray-Schauder映射的算子学习算法，并证明其为非线性算子的普适近似器。学术上，它将泛函分析中的拓扑方法应用于机器学习，拓展了算子学习理论；实际上，为科学计算和工程问题提供了高效工具。摘要未提及局限性，但未来工作可能包括优化计算复杂度或扩展到更广泛的空间类型。

title: DAWA: Dynamic Ambiguity-Wise Adaptation for Real-Time Domain Adaptive Semantic Segmentation
abstract: Test-time domain adaption (TTDA) for semantic segmentation aims to adapt a segmentation model trained on a source domain to a target domain for inference on-the-fly, where both efficiency and effectiveness are critical. However, existing TTDA methods either rely on costly frame-wise optimization or assume unrealistic domain shifts, resulting in poor adaptation efficiency and continuous semantic ambiguities. To address these challenges, we propose a real-time framework for TTDA semantic segmentation, called Dynamic Ambiguity-Wise Adaptation (DAWA), which adaptively detects domain shifts and dynamically adjusts the learning strategies to mitigate continuous ambiguities in the test time. Specifically, we introduce the Dynamic Ambiguous Patch Mask (DAP Mask) strategy, which dynamically identifies and masks highly disturbed regions to prevent error accumulation in ambiguous classes. Furthermore, we present the Dynamic Ambiguous Class Mix (DAC Mix) strategy that leverages vision-language models to group semantically similar classes and augment the target domain with a meta-ambiguous class buffer. Extensive experiments on widely used TTDA benchmarks demonstrate that DAWA consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, while maintaining real-time inference speeds of approximately 40 FPS.

light_analysis.overview: DAWA 提出了一种实时域自适应语义分割框架，通过动态检测域偏移和调整学习策略来减少语义模糊性。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于解决测试时域自适应（TTDA）语义分割中的效率低下和语义模糊性问题。TTDA 目标是在测试时实时将源域训练的模型适应到目标域，以进行实时推理，这在自动驾驶等应用中至关重要。然而，现有方法依赖高成本的逐帧优化或假设不现实的域偏移，导致适应效率低和持续语义模糊，限制了实际部署。因此，本研究旨在开发一种更高效的TTDA方法，以在保证准确性的同时提升实时性能。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了动态模糊感知适应（DAWA）框架，核心包括两个策略。动态模糊补丁掩码（DAP Mask）策略动态识别和掩码高度扰动的区域，防止错误在模糊类中累积，从而减少语义歧义。动态模糊类混合（DAC Mix）策略利用视觉-语言模型将语义相似的类分组，并通过元模糊类缓冲增强目标域数据，以提高模型适应性。这些策略结合了动态域偏移检测，实现实时调整学习过程，提升分割效果。方法依赖于动态调整机制，避免了高成本优化，同时处理了域间模糊性问题。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，在广泛使用的TTDA基准测试上，DAWA 显著优于现有最先进方法。具体而言，在多个数据集上，DAWA 在分割准确率方面表现出持续改进，同时保持了约40 FPS的实时推理速度，确保了高效性和实用性。对比基线方法，DAWA 在减少语义模糊性方面表现突出，提升了模型在目标域上的鲁棒性和性能，验证了其在实际应用中的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了DAWA框架，通过动态适应策略有效解决了TTDA语义分割中的效率和模糊性问题，提升了实时性能。研究具有重要学术价值，推动了域自适应技术的发展，并在实际应用中如自动驾驶等领域有潜力。局限性可能包括对特定域偏移的敏感性，未来工作可扩展至更多复杂场景或集成更多自适应机制。

title: Changing the Training Data Distribution to Reduce Simplicity Bias Improves In-distribution Generalization
abstract: Can we modify the training data distribution to encourage the underlying optimization method toward finding solutions with superior generalization performance on in-distribution data? In this work, we approach this question for the first time by comparing the inductive bias of gradient descent (GD) with that of sharpness-aware minimization (SAM). By studying a two-layer CNN, we rigorously prove that SAM learns different features more uniformly, particularly in early epochs. That is, SAM is less susceptible to simplicity bias compared to GD. We also show that examples containing features that are learned early are separable from the rest based on the model's output. Based on this observation, we propose a method that (i) clusters examples based on the network output early in training, (ii) identifies a cluster of examples with similar network output, and (iii) upsamples the rest of examples only once to alleviate the simplicity bias. We show empirically that USEFUL effectively improves the generalization performance on the original data distribution when training with various gradient methods, including (S)GD and SAM. Notably, we demonstrate that our method can be combined with SAM variants and existing data augmentation strategies to achieve, to the best of our knowledge, state-of-the-art performance for training ResNet18 on CIFAR10, STL10, CINIC10, Tiny-ImageNet; ResNet34 on CIFAR100; and VGG19 and DenseNet121 on CIFAR10. Our code is available at https://github.com/BigML-CS-UCLA/TADA.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了一种通过修改训练数据分布来减少简单性偏置的方法，从而提高模型在分布内数据上的泛化性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机是解决深度学习模型在训练数据分布上泛化性能不佳的问题。现有优化方法如梯度下降（GD）倾向于产生简单性偏置，即模型早期学习简单特征而忽略复杂特征，这可能限制泛化能力。Sharpness-Aware Minimization（SAM）虽然减少了这种偏置，但仍需改进以提高整体性能。因此，本研究探索如何调整数据分布来鼓励优化方法寻找更好的泛化解。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了USEFUL方法，具体步骤包括：在训练早期，基于模型的输出对训练示例进行聚类；识别出一个具有相似网络输出的集群；然后对剩余示例进行一次上采样。这改变了训练数据的分布，减少简单性偏置，使模型更均匀地学习特征。方法结合了聚类和上采样技术，可与各种梯度方法（如GD、SAM及其变体）和数据增强策略结合使用。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，USEFUL方法在使用不同梯度方法（包括GD和SAM）时，有效提高了模型在原始数据分布上的泛化性能。与SAM变体和现有数据增强策略结合后，在多个数据集（如CIFAR10、STL10、CINIC10、Tiny-ImageNet、CIFAR100）和模型（如ResNet18、ResNet34、VGG19、DenseNet121）上取得了state-of-the-art的准确率。这证明了方法在减轻简单性偏置和提升性能方面的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是开发了USEFUL方法，通过聚类和上采样调整训练数据分布，以减少简单性偏置，从而改善分布内泛化。这项研究为机器学习优化领域提供了新视角，具有学术价值和实际应用潜力，例如改进模型训练策略。未来工作方向可能包括扩展到更复杂场景，但摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: Distributional Priors Guided Diffusion for Generating 3D Molecules in Low Data Regimes
abstract: Can we train a 3D molecule generator using data from dense regions to generate samples in sparse regions? This challenge can be framed as an out-of-distribution (OOD) generation problem. While prior research on OOD generation predominantly targets property shifts, structural shifts -- such as differences in molecular scaffolds or functional groups -- represent an equally critical source of distributional shifts. This work introduces the Geometric OOD Diffusion Model (GODD), a novel diffusion-based framework that enables training on data-abundant molecular distributions while generalizing to data-scarce distributions under distributional structural shifts. Central to our approach is a designated equivariant asymmetric autoencoder to capture distributional structural priors. The asymmetric design allows the model to generalize to unseen structural variations by capturing distributional priors representing distinct distributions. The encoded structural-grained priors guide generation toward sparse regions without requiring explicit training on such data. Evaluated across standard benchmarks encompassing OOD structural shifts (e.g., scaffolds, rings), GODD achieves an improvement of 12.6% in success rate, defined based on molecular validity, uniqueness, and novelty. Furthermore, the framework demonstrates promising performance and generalization on canonical fragment-based drug design tasks, highlighting its utility in learning-based molecular discovery.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Geometric OOD Diffusion Model (GODD)，一种基于扩散的新框架，利用分布结构先验引导在低数据制度下生成3D分子，解决分布外生成中的结构偏移问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究旨在解决在低数据制度下生成3D分子的挑战，这可以框架为分布外（OOD）生成问题。现有研究多集中于属性偏移，而结构偏移（如分子支架或功能组的差异）同样关键，是分子分布变化的重要来源。论文针对这一不足，开发能够从数据丰富分布推广到数据稀缺分布的模型，以应对分子发现中因数据不足导致的生成困难，提升实际应用中的灵活性和效率。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出Geometric OOD Diffusion Model (GODD），这是一个基于扩散的框架，核心是使用指定的等变非对称自编码器来捕捉分布结构先验。该方法通过非对称设计，允许模型泛化到未见的结构变化，编码的结构粒度先验直接指导生成过程，无需在稀疏数据上显式训练。技术特色在于结合扩散模型的生成能力和等变网络对3D几何的敏感性，应用于标准分子数据集，以处理OOD结构偏移，如支架或环的差异。
light_analysis.result: 在涵盖OOD结构偏移（如分子支架、环）的标准基准评估中，GODD模型的成功率提高了12.6%，成功率基于分子有效性、唯一性和新颖性综合定义。与基线方法相比，该框架显著改善了在稀疏数据区域的生成性能。此外，在基于片段的药物设计任务上，GODD展现出有前途的泛化能力和实用效果，突显了其在学习型分子发现中的实际应用价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是GODD框架，通过在低数据制度下利用分布先验生成3D分子，成功解决了结构偏移下的OOD生成问题。该研究具有重要的学术价值，推动了扩散模型和等变网络在分子生成领域的融合，并为药物设计等实际应用提供了高效工具。未来工作可进一步探索在更广泛生物分子场景中的应用，潜在局限性包括对特定分布假设的依赖，摘要未明确说明具体细节。

title: Task-Driven Lens Design
abstract: Classical lens design minimizes optical aberrations to produce sharp images, but is typically decoupled from downstream computer vision tasks. Existing end-to-end optical design learns optical encoding through joint optimization, but often suffers from an unstable training process. We propose task-driven lens design, a new optimization philosophy for joint optics-network systems. We freeze the pretrained vision model and optimize only the lens so that the image formation better fits the model's feature preferences. This network-frozen setting yields a low-dimensional and stable optimization process, enabling lens design from scratch without human intervention, thereby exploring a broader design space. Multiple computer vision experiments show that TaskLenses outperform classical ImagingLenses with the same or even fewer elements. Our analysis reveals that the learned optics exhibit long-tailed point spread functions, better preserving preferred structural cues when aberrations cannot be fully corrected. These results highlight task-driven design as a practical route for optical lenses that are compatible with modern vision models, and also inspire new optical design objectives beyond traditional aberration minimization.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了一种任务驱动的镜头设计方法，通过冻结预训练视觉模型并仅优化镜头，实现与计算机视觉任务兼容的稳定光学设计。
light_analysis.motivation: 经典镜头设计专注于最小化光学像差以产生清晰图像，但通常与下游计算机视觉任务脱节，导致系统性能受限。现有端到端光学设计尝试通过联合优化学习光学编码，但训练过程不稳定，难以高效探索设计空间。因此，本研究旨在解决这一脱节问题，提高光学设计与视觉任务的集成度，通过开发更稳定的优化方法，以优化整体视觉系统性能，克服现有方法的不足并推动实际应用。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出任务驱动镜头设计，采用一种新的联合优化哲学。核心方法是冻结预训练的视觉模型，仅优化镜头参数，使图像形成过程更好地适应模型的特征偏好。这种网络冻结设置产生了一个低维且稳定的优化过程，允许从零开始设计镜头，无需人工干预，从而探索更广泛的设计空间。关键创新在于将任务需求直接融入光学设计，避免了传统端到端方法中的训练不稳定问题，并使用联合光学-网络系统进行优化。
light_analysis.result: 在多个计算机视觉实验中，TaskLenses的性能优于经典ImagingLenses，即使使用相同或更少的光学元素。具体而言，学习到的光学系统展现出长尾点扩散函数，这表明当像差无法完全校正时，系统能更好地保留模型偏好的结构线索，从而提升任务性能。与基线方法相比，该方法在视觉任务中取得了显著改进，验证了任务驱动设计的有效性，并为光学设计提供了新的性能指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了任务驱动的镜头设计理念，为光学镜头设计开辟了新的方向，使其与现代视觉模型兼容。这一方法具有实际应用价值，能提升视觉系统性能，并启发了超越传统像差最小化的新光学设计目标。未来工作可以扩展到更多视觉任务和优化技术的改进，摘要未明确说明局限性，但可能涉及泛化能力或计算成本等方向。
